subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself at the zenith of noon, yet the people recognize Him not, nor did they know Him aforetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر نفسه فی قطب الزوال ولکن الناس هم لایعرفون و من قبل ان یعرف
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
